## Testing Performed

Please confirm the following:

### Unit Tests

- [ ] Tests added/updated where required
- [ ] Passed locally

```bash
npm run test:run
```

---

### Accessibility Tests

- [ ] Accessibility checks pass

```bash
npm run test:run
```

---

### End-to-End Tests

- [ ] E2E tests added/updated where required
- [ ] Passed locally

```bash
npm run test:e2e
```

---

### Build Verification

- [ ] Production build succeeds

```bash
npm run build
```

---

## Code Quality Checklist

- [ ] TypeScript has no errors
- [ ] ESLint passes
- [ ] Code is formatted
- [ ] No unnecessary `any` usage
- [ ] Existing functionality is not broken

---

## Accessibility Checklist

For UI changes:

- [ ] Semantic HTML used
- [ ] Keyboard navigation works
- [ ] Focus states implemented
- [ ] Form fields have proper labels
- [ ] ARIA attributes added where required
- [ ] Screen reader behavior considered

---

## API / Data Changes Checklist

For API-related changes:

- [ ] API calls are handled through service layer
- [ ] Loading states handled
- [ ] Error states handled
- [ ] Retry behavior reviewed
- [ ] Request cancellation considered where applicable

---

## Design System Checklist

For UI changes:

- [ ] Existing design tokens reused
- [ ] No hardcoded colors/spacings where tokens exist
- [ ] Component styles are reusable
- [ ] Responsive behavior verified

---
